title: Welcome To My Blog
text:
This is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.

title: My First Python Code Post
text:
Watch how Quarto can actually run Python code and show the result!
def calculate_squares(numbers): return [n**2 for n in numbers]
my_list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] print(“Original:”, my_list) print(“Squares:”, calculate_squares(my_list))

title: My First Python Code Post
text:
